brand_dna.category: Performance-positioned beef jerky and meat snacks (jerky, slabs, sticks, toasted corn) sold direct-to-consumer in bulk sizes.
brand_dna.core_belief: Built for high-energy moments and people with grit - 'We didn't just want to make it. We wanted to dominate.'
proof_points: 100% American made and sourced supply chain, from start to finish
USDA-owned factory; sources raw material and co-packs own recipes across America
All-natural brisket jerky - no added MSG, nitrites, nitrates, or artificial ingredients
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, high-energy performance snack for athletes and grinders - not gas-station jerky, sold in bulk with build-your-own-box savings.

voice_pillars.name: Gritty & Defiant
voice_pillars.desc: Underdog, no-excuses tone that frames the brand as pushing through where others quit.
voice_pillars.quote: We didn't follow the playbook; we burned it and wrote our own.

voice_pillars.name: Performance-Driven
voice_pillars.desc: Frames jerky as fuel for training, competing, and high-intensity moments.
voice_pillars.quote: Premium beef jerky crafted for athletes, grinders, and fans.

voice_pillars.name: Playfully Bold
voice_pillars.desc: Loud, cheeky copy that talks trash and cracks jokes about the product.
voice_pillars.quote: Why are you wasting time reading the comments? Order it already!

voice_pillars.name: Craft-Proud
voice_pillars.desc: Talks up texture and cut like a steakhouse, emphasizing tenderness and quality.
voice_pillars.quote: as soft as a pillow, enhanced with a subtle lemon pepper note.

phrases: like a real steak that was chopped up and dried
Soft to chew, long lasting taste
not artificial and rubber tasting like gas station jerky
I love the tenderness and sweetness

icp: Active, competitive men and gym-goers who want a high-protein, real-beef snack they can buy in bulk and trust more than gas-station jerky.

personas.name: The Grinder Athlete
personas.description: Trains hard and wants performance fuel - move them with 'built for athletes, grinders, and fans' and protein-source angles.

personas.name: The Bulk Stocker
personas.description: Buys big to save and keep snacks on hand - move them with build-your-own-box, up to 20% off, and free shipping over $100.

personas.name: The Flavor Snob
personas.description: Hates rubbery gas-station jerky and wants real steak texture - move them with tenderness, brisket cut, and 'filet mignon of jerky.'

products_ladder.title: Texas Style Sugar Free Slabs Garlic Beef Jerky
Texas Style Sugar Free Slabs Original Beef Jerky
BULK Sweet & Spicy Brisket Beef Jerky

offers: Build Your Own Box - mix and match for up to 20% off (tiered 5/10/15/20%)
Bulk sizing from 2.25 oz up to 10 lb bags and 12-packs
Gainz Box Starter Kit - 4 all-natural samplers, $39.99

allowed.claim: 100% American made and sourced supply chain, start to finish
All-natural brisket jerky with no added MSG, nitrites, nitrates, or artificial ingredients
Made from prime brisket cuts with higher marbling for a tender texture

banned.claim: Eating our jerky boosts your immunity
banned.why: Banned immunity claim - not permitted for a food product without substantiation.
Banned fat-burning claim; also unsubstantiated weight-loss health claim.

banned.claim: Our jerky helps treat or prevent any disease or condition
banned.why: Banned disease-treatment claim for a food product.
Unqualified 'detox' and vague 'clean' are risky as headline claims in this category.

banned.claim: Low sugar / high protein (as a general headline)
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the actual label per SKU; only state per-product figures like the sugar-free slabs or 1g sugar corn.
